notes: Used to make source-backed division moves explicit. The model applies these moves before ranking-policy adjustments so fighters are removed from old divisions and placed in their active division.

division_moves.note: Makhachev is treated as a welterweight after the Jack Della Maddalena title fight. His elite lightweight resume carries into the pre-fight projection with a small division-transfer penalty instead of resetting him to a fresh 1500 rating.

Pereira is treated as a heavyweight after the Ciryl Gane fight. Because he was a dominant recent light heavyweight champion, most of that resume transfers, while the heavyweight loss is still applied as current-division context.
Costa's latest local fight data is a light heavyweight win over Azamat Murzakanov, so the snapshot should not also keep him in middleweight.
